name: Annual Strategy Planning — C-Suite Alignment
description: Coordinated C-suite orchestration to define corporate strategy priorities for 2024.

result.name: 2024 Strategic Priorities
result.description: Three core priorities agreed: product-led growth, operational excellence, market expansion.

hasPart.text: Let's align on our top three strategic priorities for 2024. I want input from each function before we finalise.
From a finance perspective, operational efficiency must be priority one. We're carrying 18% overhead above industry benchmark. Cutting that to 12% would free $40M for strategic investment.
Agreed on efficiency, but product-led growth is equally critical. Our NPS is 72 — investing in self-serve onboarding could drive 30% ARR growth without proportional headcount growth.
Both valid. I'll add a third: APAC market expansion. The TAM there is $2.1B and we have <1% share. A targeted $15M investment could capture 3–5% within 24 months.
The freed $40M from efficiency provides headroom for both product investment ($20M) and APAC entry ($15M) with $5M contingency. I approve this allocation framework.
hasPart.disambiguatingDescription: CFO signs off on capital allocation.
